name: JiraGenius
description: An expert Jira Cloud REST API plugin for Copilot CLI and Claude Code CLI. Provides sub-agents and skills for configuring, managing, and supporting Jira Cloud instances.

agents.name: coordinator
agents.description: Main orchestrator that routes Jira requests to the appropriate specialist sub-agent

agents.name: issue-manager
agents.description: Expert in creating, reading, updating, deleting, and transitioning Jira issues

agents.name: project-admin
agents.description: Specialist in Jira project creation, configuration, schemes, and administration

agents.name: workflow-designer
agents.description: Expert in designing and configuring Jira workflows, statuses, and transitions

agents.name: search-analyst
agents.description: JQL query expert for advanced searching, filtering, and reporting in Jira

agents.name: permissions-manager
agents.description: Specialist in Jira users, groups, roles, and permission schemes

agents.name: board-manager
agents.description: Expert in Scrum and Kanban boards, sprints, backlogs, and agile features

agents.name: schema-expert
agents.description: Specialist in custom fields, field configurations, screens, and issue type schemes

skills.name: authentication
skills.description: OAuth 2.0 and API token authentication for Jira Cloud

skills.name: rest-api-v3
skills.description: Complete Jira Cloud REST API v3 endpoint reference

skills.name: error-handling
skills.description: Jira API error codes, troubleshooting, and resolution patterns

skills.name: pagination
skills.description: Pagination strategies for Jira Cloud REST API responses

skills.name: jql-syntax
skills.description: Complete JQL syntax reference with operators, functions, and keywords

skills.name: webhooks
skills.description: Jira webhook registration, events, and payload handling

skills.name: bulk-operations
skills.description: Bulk create, update, delete, and transition operations

skills.name: rate-limiting
skills.description: Rate limiting policies, backoff strategies, and best practices

commands.name: jira-issue
commands.description: Create, read, update, or delete Jira issues

commands.name: jira-project
commands.description: Manage Jira projects and project settings

commands.name: jira-field
commands.description: Manage custom fields and field configurations

commands.name: jira-bulk
commands.description: Perform bulk operations on Jira resources
